current_iteration.baseline_audit_status: v0.24.0 package audited with zero warnings before modification.
current_iteration.approval_evidence: User approved one integrated build using the uploaded continuity package and both preceding design conversations.
approved_scope: Restore regressed v0.24 visual and trust behavior
Remove Provider View until a distinct use case exists
Make evidence links contextual and specific
Add privacy-collapsed medications and diagnoses to Dashboard
explicitly_excluded: Embedding shared beta API secrets in browser code
acceptance_criteria: Provider View is absent from navigation and routing
Fitness opens on Favorites and provides a clear fallback
Evidence review does not expose internal UUIDs as headings
Medication and condition details are collapsed by default
current_iteration.rollback_plan: Restore v0.25.0 build 2026.07.21.2; no data migration is required.
